en.title: BMP to PDF
en.metaDescription: Convert BMP bitmap images to PDF. Legacy format support with quality preservation.
en.description:
BMP to PDF converts bitmap images into PDF documents. BMP is a legacy image format commonly used in Windows environments, and this tool makes it easy to convert these files to modern PDF format.

Combine multiple BMP files into a single PDF with customizable settings. The conversion compresses the typically large BMP files while maintaining image quality.

All conversion happens in your browser, ensuring your images remain private.

howToUse.title: Upload BMP Files
howToUse.description: Drag and drop your BMP images or click to select files.

howToUse.title: Configure Options
howToUse.description: Arrange images and select page settings.

howToUse.title: Convert and Download
howToUse.description: Click Convert to create your PDF.

useCases.title: Legacy File Conversion
useCases.description: Convert old BMP files to modern PDF format.

useCases.title: Windows Screenshots
useCases.description: Convert Windows bitmap screenshots to PDF.

useCases.title: Archive Modernization
useCases.description: Update legacy image archives to PDF format.

faq.question: Will file size be reduced?
faq.answer: Yes, BMP files are typically compressed significantly when converted to PDF.

faq.question: Is quality preserved?
faq.answer: Yes, image quality is maintained during conversion.

faq.question: What BMP color depths are supported?
faq.answer: All standard BMP color depths are supported, including 24-bit and 32-bit.

zh.title: BMP转PDF
zh.metaDescription: 将BMP位图图像转换为PDF。传统格式支持，保持质量。
zh.description:
BMP转PDF将位图图像转换为PDF文档。BMP是Windows环境中常用的传统图像格式，这个工具使将这些文件转换为现代PDF格式变得简单。

将多个BMP文件合并成一个PDF，并可自定义设置。转换过程在保持图像质量的同时压缩通常较大的BMP文件。

所有转换都在您的浏览器中进行，确保您的图像保持私密。

howToUse.title: 上传BMP文件
howToUse.description: 拖放您的BMP图像或点击选择文件。

howToUse.title: 配置选项
howToUse.description: 排列图像并选择页面设置。

howToUse.title: 转换并下载
howToUse.description: 点击转换创建PDF。

useCases.title: 传统文件转换
useCases.description: 将旧的BMP文件转换为现代PDF格式。

useCases.title: Windows截图
useCases.description: 将Windows位图截图转换为PDF。

useCases.title: 存档现代化
useCases.description: 将传统图像存档更新为PDF格式。

faq.question: 文件大小会减小吗？
faq.answer: 是的，BMP文件在转换为PDF时通常会显著压缩。

faq.question: 质量会保留吗？
faq.answer: 是的，转换过程中图像质量得以保持。

faq.question: 支持哪些BMP颜色深度？
faq.answer: 支持所有标准BMP颜色深度，包括24位和32位。

en.title: PSD to PDF
en.metaDescription: Convert Adobe Photoshop (PSD) files to PDF format. Supports multiple files and preserves image quality.
en.description:
PSD to PDF converts Adobe Photoshop (PSD) files into PDF documents. This tool allows you to view and share PSD designs without needing Photoshop installed.

You can convert multiple PSD files at once and combine them into a single PDF document. The tool processes each PSD file, rendering the visible layers into high-quality PDF pages.

All conversion happens locally in your browser, ensuring your designs remain private and secure.

howToUse.title: Upload PSD Files
howToUse.description: Drag and drop your PSD or PSB files, or click to select them from your device.

howToUse.title: Arrange Order
howToUse.description: Drag and drop the file thumbnails to arrange them in the desired order.

howToUse.title: Convert and Download
howToUse.description: Click Convert to render the PSDs and download your PDF document.

useCases.title: Share Designs
useCases.description: Share Photoshop designs with clients or colleagues who don't have Photoshop.

useCases.title: Portfolio Creation
useCases.description: Compile your design work into a professional PDF portfolio.

useCases.title: Print Preparation
useCases.description: Convert designs to PDF for printing purposes.

faq.question: Do I need Photoshop installed?
faq.answer: No, this tool works entirely in your browser without requiring Adobe Photoshop.

faq.question: Are layers preserved?
faq.answer: The tool renders the visible state of the PSD (composite image). Individual layers are flattened in the PDF.

faq.question: What is the maximum file size?
faq.answer: You can upload files up to 100MB each. Large PSD files may take a moment to process.

zh.title: PSD转PDF
zh.metaDescription: 将Adobe Photoshop (PSD)文件转换为PDF。保留图层和高质量。
zh.description:
直接在浏览器中将Adobe Photoshop (PSD)文件转换为PDF格式。此工具处理复杂的PSD文件，并在转换过程中保持高质量的视觉效果。

非常适合设计师和艺术家与没有安装Photoshop的客户或同事分享他们的作品。转换生成干净、可视化的PDF文档。

所有处理都在本地完成，确保您的设计和作品保留在设备上，保持私密和安全。

howToUse.title: 上传PSD文件
howToUse.description: 将PSD文件拖放到上传区域。支持大文件。

howToUse.title: 处理
howToUse.description: 工具将读取PSD数据并将其转换为PDF格式。

howToUse.title: 下载
howToUse.description: 立即下载转换后的PDF文件。

useCases.title: 客户预览
useCases.description: 以通用的PDF格式向客户发送设计稿。

useCases.title: 作品集创建
useCases.description: 将Photoshop作品编译成PDF作品集以供求职申请。

useCases.title: 打印准备
useCases.description: 将PSD设计转换为PDF，以便打印服务更好地处理。

faq.question: 需要安装Photoshop吗？
faq.answer: 不需要，此工具完全在浏览器中运行，无需Adobe Photoshop。

faq.question: 图层会保留吗？
faq.answer: 生成的PDF是用于查看的PSD扁平化版本。

faq.question: 有文件大小限制吗？
faq.answer: 我们支持大文件，但非常大的高分辨率PSD可能需要更长的处理时间。

en.title: TIFF to PDF
en.metaDescription: Convert TIFF images to PDF. Support for multi-page TIFF files and high-quality conversion.
en.description:
TIFF to PDF converts TIFF images, including multi-page TIFF files, into PDF documents. TIFF is commonly used for high-quality scans and professional graphics.

Multi-page TIFF files are automatically converted to multi-page PDFs. The conversion preserves the high quality of your original images.

All conversion happens in your browser, ensuring your files remain private.

howToUse.title: Upload TIFF Files
howToUse.description: Drag and drop your TIFF files or click to select.

howToUse.title: Configure Options
howToUse.description: Select page settings and compression options.

howToUse.title: Convert and Download
howToUse.description: Click Convert to create your PDF.

useCases.title: Scanned Documents
useCases.description: Convert high-quality scans from TIFF to PDF.

useCases.title: Professional Graphics
useCases.description: Convert professional TIFF graphics for distribution.

useCases.title: Archive Conversion
useCases.description: Convert TIFF archives to more accessible PDF format.

faq.question: Are multi-page TIFFs supported?
faq.answer: Yes, multi-page TIFF files are converted to multi-page PDFs automatically.

faq.question: Is quality preserved?
faq.answer: Yes, TIFF quality is fully preserved in the PDF output.

faq.question: What compression is used?
faq.answer: You can choose between lossless and lossy compression options.

zh.title: TIFF转PDF
zh.metaDescription: 将TIFF图像转换为PDF。支持多页TIFF文件和高质量转换。
zh.description:
TIFF转PDF将TIFF图像（包括多页TIFF文件）转换为PDF文档。TIFF常用于高质量扫描和专业图形。

多页TIFF文件自动转换为多页PDF。转换过程保留原始图像的高质量。

所有转换都在您的浏览器中进行，确保您的文件保持私密。

howToUse.title: 上传TIFF文件
howToUse.description: 拖放您的TIFF文件或点击选择。

howToUse.title: 配置选项
howToUse.description: 选择页面设置和压缩选项。

howToUse.title: 转换并下载
howToUse.description: 点击转换创建PDF。

useCases.title: 扫描文档
useCases.description: 将高质量扫描从TIFF转换为PDF。

useCases.title: 专业图形
useCases.description: 转换专业TIFF图形以供分发。

useCases.title: 存档转换
useCases.description: 将TIFF存档转换为更易访问的PDF格式。

faq.question: 支持多页TIFF吗？
faq.answer: 是的，多页TIFF文件自动转换为多页PDF。

faq.question: 质量会保留吗？
faq.answer: 是的，TIFF质量在PDF输出中完全保留。

faq.question: 使用什么压缩？
faq.answer: 您可以选择无损和有损压缩选项。

en.title: Word to PDF
en.metaDescription: Convert Word documents (DOCX) to PDF. Preserve formatting and layout in your converted documents.
en.description:
Word to PDF converts Microsoft Word documents into PDF format while preserving the original formatting, layout, and content structure.

Upload your DOCX files and get high-quality PDF output suitable for sharing, printing, or archiving. The conversion maintains text formatting, paragraph styles, and basic document structure.

All conversion happens locally in your browser, ensuring your documents remain private and secure.

howToUse.title: Upload Word Document
howToUse.description: Drag and drop your .docx file or click to select from your device.

howToUse.title: Wait for Processing
howToUse.description: The tool will load the document and prepare it for conversion.

howToUse.title: Download PDF
howToUse.description: Click Download to save your converted PDF document.

useCases.title: Document Sharing
useCases.description: Convert Word documents to PDF for universal sharing and viewing.

useCases.title: Print Preparation
useCases.description: Create print-ready PDFs from Word documents.

useCases.title: Document Archive
useCases.description: Archive Word documents in stable PDF format for long-term storage.

faq.question: Is .doc format supported?
faq.answer: Currently only .docx format is supported. Please convert .doc files to .docx first using Microsoft Word or LibreOffice.

faq.question: Are images preserved?
faq.answer: Text content and basic formatting are preserved. Complex layouts with many images may have simplified rendering.

faq.question: Is the conversion secure?
faq.answer: Yes, all processing happens in your browser. Your documents never leave your device.

zh.title: Word转PDF
zh.metaDescription: 将Word文档（DOCX）转换为PDF。保留格式和布局。
zh.description:
Word转PDF将Microsoft Word文档转换为PDF格式，同时保留原始格式、布局和内容结构。

上传您的DOCX文件，获得适合分享、打印或存档的高质量PDF输出。转换过程保持文本格式、段落样式和基本文档结构。

所有转换都在您的浏览器本地进行，确保您的文档保持私密和安全。

howToUse.title: 上传Word文档
howToUse.description: 拖放您的.docx文件或点击从设备中选择。

howToUse.title: 等待处理
howToUse.description: 工具将加载文档并准备进行转换。

howToUse.title: 下载PDF
howToUse.description: 点击下载保存转换后的PDF文档。

useCases.title: 文档分享
useCases.description: 将Word文档转换为PDF以便通用分享和查看。

useCases.title: 打印准备
useCases.description: 从Word文档创建可打印的PDF。

useCases.title: 文档存档
useCases.description: 以稳定的PDF格式存档Word文档以供长期保存。

faq.question: 支持.doc格式吗？
faq.answer: 目前仅支持.docx格式。请先使用Microsoft Word或LibreOffice将.doc文件转换为.docx。

faq.question: 图像会保留吗？
faq.answer: 文本内容和基本格式会保留。包含许多图像的复杂布局可能会简化渲染。

faq.question: 转换安全吗？
faq.answer: 是的，所有处理都在您的浏览器中进行。您的文档永远不会离开您的设备。

en.title: Excel to PDF
en.metaDescription: Convert Excel spreadsheets (XLSX) to PDF. Preserve tables and data in your converted documents.
en.description:
Excel to PDF converts Microsoft Excel spreadsheets into PDF format while preserving table structure and data organization.

Upload your XLSX files and get clean PDF output with properly formatted tables. Each sheet in your workbook becomes a separate section in the PDF.

All conversion happens locally in your browser, ensuring your data remains private and secure.

howToUse.title: Upload Excel File
howToUse.description: Drag and drop your .xlsx file or click to select from your device.

howToUse.title: Wait for Processing
howToUse.description: The tool will load the spreadsheet and convert all sheets.

howToUse.title: Download PDF
howToUse.description: Click Download to save your converted PDF document.

useCases.title: Report Sharing
useCases.description: Convert Excel reports to PDF for distribution to stakeholders.

useCases.title: Data Archiving
useCases.description: Archive spreadsheet data in stable PDF format.

useCases.title: Print Preparation
useCases.description: Create print-ready PDFs from Excel worksheets.

faq.question: Are multiple sheets supported?
faq.answer: Yes, all sheets in the workbook are converted and included in the PDF.

faq.question: Is .xls format supported?
faq.answer: Currently only .xlsx format is supported. Please save .xls files as .xlsx first.

faq.question: Are formulas preserved?
faq.answer: The PDF shows calculated values. Formulas are not executable in PDF format.

zh.title: Excel转PDF
zh.metaDescription: 将Excel电子表格（XLSX）转换为PDF。保留表格和数据。
zh.description:
Excel转PDF将Microsoft Excel电子表格转换为PDF格式，同时保留表格结构和数据组织。

上传您的XLSX文件，获得具有正确格式化表格的清晰PDF输出。工作簿中的每个工作表都会成为PDF中的单独部分。

所有转换都在您的浏览器本地进行，确保您的数据保持私密和安全。

howToUse.title: 上传Excel文件
howToUse.description: 拖放您的.xlsx文件或点击从设备中选择。

howToUse.title: 等待处理
howToUse.description: 工具将加载电子表格并转换所有工作表。

howToUse.title: 下载PDF
howToUse.description: 点击下载保存转换后的PDF文档。

useCases.title: 报告分享
useCases.description: 将Excel报告转换为PDF以供利益相关者分发。

useCases.title: 数据存档
useCases.description: 以稳定的PDF格式存档电子表格数据。

useCases.title: 打印准备
useCases.description: 从Excel工作表创建可打印的PDF。

faq.question: 支持多个工作表吗？
faq.answer: 是的，工作簿中的所有工作表都会被转换并包含在PDF中。

faq.question: 支持.xls格式吗？
faq.answer: 目前仅支持.xlsx格式。请先将.xls文件另存为.xlsx。

faq.question: 公式会保留吗？
faq.answer: PDF显示计算值。公式在PDF格式中不可执行。

en.title: PowerPoint to PDF
en.metaDescription: Convert PowerPoint presentations (PPTX) to PDF. Preserve slides and content for easy sharing.
en.description:
PowerPoint to PDF converts Microsoft PowerPoint presentations into PDF format, preserving slide content and text for easy sharing and viewing.

Each slide becomes a page in the PDF, maintaining the presentation flow. Perfect for sharing presentations with people who don't have PowerPoint installed.

All conversion happens locally in your browser, ensuring your presentations remain private and secure.

howToUse.title: Upload PowerPoint File
howToUse.description: Drag and drop your .pptx file or click to select from your device.

howToUse.title: Wait for Processing
howToUse.description: The tool will extract slide content and create the PDF.

howToUse.title: Download PDF
howToUse.description: Click Download to save your converted PDF document.

useCases.title: Presentation Sharing
useCases.description: Share presentations with anyone without requiring PowerPoint.

useCases.title: Handout Creation
useCases.description: Create PDF handouts from your presentation slides.

useCases.title: Archive Presentations
useCases.description: Archive presentations in stable PDF format.

faq.question: Are animations preserved?
faq.answer: PDF is a static format, so animations and transitions are not preserved. Each slide becomes a static page.

faq.question: Is .ppt format supported?
faq.answer: Currently only .pptx format is supported. Please convert .ppt files to .pptx first.

faq.question: Are speaker notes included?
faq.answer: Currently, speaker notes are not included in the PDF output.

zh.title: PowerPoint转PDF
zh.metaDescription: 将PowerPoint演示文稿（PPTX）转换为PDF。保留幻灯片内容便于分享。
zh.description:
PowerPoint转PDF将Microsoft PowerPoint演示文稿转换为PDF格式，保留幻灯片内容和文本以便轻松分享和查看。

每张幻灯片成为PDF中的一页，保持演示流。非常适合与没有安装PowerPoint的人分享演示文稿。

所有转换都在您的浏览器本地进行，确保您的演示文稿保持私密和安全。

howToUse.title: 上传PowerPoint文件
howToUse.description: 拖放您的.pptx文件或点击从设备中选择。

howToUse.title: 等待处理
howToUse.description: 工具将提取幻灯片内容并创建PDF。

howToUse.title: 下载PDF
howToUse.description: 点击下载保存转换后的PDF文档。

useCases.title: 演示文稿分享
useCases.description: 与任何人分享演示文稿，无需PowerPoint。

useCases.title: 讲义创建
useCases.description: 从演示幻灯片创建PDF讲义。

useCases.title: 存档演示文稿
useCases.description: 以稳定的PDF格式存档演示文稿。

faq.question: 动画会保留吗？
faq.answer: PDF是静态格式，因此动画和过渡不会保留。每张幻灯片变成静态页面。

faq.question: 支持.ppt格式吗？
faq.answer: 目前仅支持.pptx格式。请先将.ppt文件转换为.pptx。

faq.question: 演讲者备注会包含吗？
faq.answer: 目前演讲者备注不会包含在PDF输出中。

en.title: XPS to PDF
en.metaDescription: Convert XPS documents to PDF format. High-fidelity conversion preserving layout and graphics.
en.description:
XPS to PDF converts Microsoft XPS (XML Paper Specification) documents into PDF format while preserving the original layout, text, and vector graphics.

XPS is a fixed-document format similar to PDF. This tool provides high-fidelity conversion using native XPS parsing, ensuring accurate reproduction of your documents.

All conversion happens locally in your browser, ensuring your documents remain private and secure.

howToUse.title: Upload XPS File
howToUse.description: Drag and drop your .xps file or click to select from your device.

howToUse.title: Wait for Processing
howToUse.description: The tool will parse and convert the XPS document.

howToUse.title: Download PDF
howToUse.description: Click Download to save your converted PDF document.

useCases.title: Format Conversion
useCases.description: Convert XPS documents to more widely supported PDF format.

useCases.title: Document Sharing
useCases.description: Share XPS documents with users who don't have XPS viewers.

useCases.title: Archive Migration
useCases.description: Migrate XPS archives to PDF format for better compatibility.

faq.question: What is XPS format?
faq.answer: XPS (XML Paper Specification) is Microsoft's fixed-document format, similar to PDF. It's commonly used for Windows printing.

faq.question: Is the conversion lossless?
faq.answer: Yes, the conversion preserves text, graphics, and layout with high fidelity.

faq.question: Are multi-page XPS files supported?
faq.answer: Yes, all pages in the XPS document are converted to the PDF.

zh.title: XPS转PDF
zh.metaDescription: 将XPS文档转换为PDF格式。高保真转换，保留布局和图形。
zh.description:
XPS转PDF将Microsoft XPS（XML纸规范）文档转换为PDF格式，同时保留原始布局、文本和矢量图形。

XPS是一种类似于PDF的固定文档格式。此工具使用原生XPS解析提供高保真转换，确保文档的准确再现。

所有转换都在您的浏览器本地进行，确保您的文档保持私密和安全。

howToUse.title: 上传XPS文件
howToUse.description: 拖放您的.xps文件或点击从设备中选择。

howToUse.title: 等待处理
howToUse.description: 工具将解析并转换XPS文档。

howToUse.title: 下载PDF
howToUse.description: 点击下载保存转换后的PDF文档。

useCases.title: 格式转换
useCases.description: 将XPS文档转换为更广泛支持的PDF格式。

useCases.title: 文档分享
useCases.description: 与没有XPS查看器的用户分享XPS文档。

useCases.title: 存档迁移
useCases.description: 将XPS存档迁移到PDF格式以获得更好的兼容性。

faq.question: 什么是XPS格式？
faq.answer: XPS（XML纸规范）是Microsoft的固定文档格式，类似于PDF。它常用于Windows打印。

faq.question: 转换是无损的吗？
faq.answer: 是的，转换以高保真度保留文本、图形和布局。

faq.question: 支持多页XPS文件吗？
faq.answer: 是的，XPS文档中的所有页面都会转换到PDF中。

en.title: RTF to PDF
en.metaDescription: Convert RTF (Rich Text Format) files to PDF. Preserve text formatting in your documents.
en.description:
RTF to PDF converts Rich Text Format files into PDF documents. RTF is a widely supported text format that includes basic formatting like fonts, colors, and styles.

Upload your RTF files and get clean PDF output while preserving text content and basic formatting. Perfect for converting legacy documents to modern PDF format.

All conversion happens locally in your browser, ensuring your documents remain private and secure.

howToUse.title: Upload RTF File
howToUse.description: Drag and drop your .rtf file or click to select from your device.

howToUse.title: Wait for Processing
howToUse.description: The tool will parse and convert the RTF content.

howToUse.title: Download PDF
howToUse.description: Click Download to save your converted PDF document.

useCases.title: Legacy Conversion
useCases.description: Convert old RTF documents to modern PDF format.

useCases.title: Document Sharing
useCases.description: Share RTF documents in universally viewable PDF format.

useCases.title: Archive Documents
useCases.description: Archive RTF files in stable PDF format for long-term storage.

faq.question: What formatting is preserved?
faq.answer: Basic text formatting including fonts, paragraphs, and styles are converted. Complex RTF features may be simplified.

faq.question: Can I convert multiple RTF files?
faq.answer: Currently, one file is converted at a time. Use Merge PDF to combine multiple converted files.

faq.question: Are embedded images supported?
faq.answer: Text content is the primary focus. Embedded objects may not be rendered.

zh.title: RTF转PDF
zh.metaDescription: 将RTF（富文本格式）文件转换为PDF。保留文档中的文本格式。
zh.description:
RTF转PDF将富文本格式文件转换为PDF文档。RTF是一种广泛支持的文本格式，包含基本格式如字体、颜色和样式。

上传您的RTF文件，获得干净的PDF输出，同时保留文本内容和基本格式。非常适合将旧文档转换为现代PDF格式。

所有转换都在您的浏览器本地进行，确保您的文档保持私密和安全。

howToUse.title: 上传RTF文件
howToUse.description: 拖放您的.rtf文件或点击从设备中选择。

howToUse.title: 等待处理
howToUse.description: 工具将解析并转换RTF内容。

howToUse.title: 下载PDF
howToUse.description: 点击下载保存转换后的PDF文档。

useCases.title: 旧版转换
useCases.description: 将旧的RTF文档转换为现代PDF格式。

useCases.title: 文档分享
useCases.description: 以通用可查看的PDF格式分享RTF文档。

useCases.title: 存档文档
useCases.description: 以稳定的PDF格式存档RTF文件以供长期保存。

faq.question: 保留哪些格式？
faq.answer: 包括字体、段落和样式在内的基本文本格式会被转换。复杂的RTF功能可能会被简化。

faq.question: 可以转换多个RTF文件吗？
faq.answer: 目前一次只能转换一个文件。使用合并PDF来合并多个转换后的文件。

faq.question: 支持嵌入图像吗？
faq.answer: 文本内容是主要焦点。嵌入对象可能无法渲染。

en.title: EPUB to PDF
en.metaDescription: Convert EPUB e-books to PDF. Preserve formatting, images, and chapter structure.
en.description:
EPUB to PDF converts electronic book files into high-quality PDF documents. EPUB is the most popular e-book format, used by most e-readers and digital libraries.

This tool preserves text formatting, images, and the chapter structure of your e-books. Perfect for printing, archiving, or sharing e-books in a universally viewable format.

All conversion happens locally in your browser using advanced rendering technology, ensuring your books remain private and the conversion is fast.

howToUse.title: Upload EPUB File
howToUse.description: Drag and drop your .epub file or click to select from your device.

howToUse.title: Wait for Conversion
howToUse.description: The tool will render and convert all pages of your e-book.

howToUse.title: Download PDF
howToUse.description: Click Download to save your converted PDF document.

useCases.title: Print E-books
useCases.description: Convert e-books to PDF for physical printing.

useCases.title: Archive Books
useCases.description: Store e-books in long-term stable PDF format.

useCases.title: Share Documents
useCases.description: Share e-books with anyone, even without an e-reader.

faq.question: Is the formatting preserved?
faq.answer: Yes! This tool uses native EPUB rendering, preserving text formatting, images, and layout with high fidelity.

faq.question: Are DRM-protected EPUBs supported?
faq.answer: No, DRM-protected e-books cannot be converted. Only DRM-free EPUB files are supported.

faq.question: How is page size determined?
faq.answer: EPUB content is rendered to standard A4 page size for optimal readability.

zh.title: EPUB转PDF
zh.metaDescription: 将EPUB电子书转换为PDF。保留格式、图片和章节结构。
zh.description:
EPUB转PDF将电子书文件转换为高质量的PDF文档。EPUB是最流行的电子书格式，被大多数电子阅读器和数字图书馆使用。

此工具可保留电子书的文本格式、图片和章节结构。非常适合打印、存档或以通用格式分享电子书。

所有转换都在您的浏览器本地进行，使用先进的渲染技术，确保您的书籍保持私密，转换速度快。

howToUse.title: 上传EPUB文件
howToUse.description: 拖放您的.epub文件或点击从设备中选择。

howToUse.title: 等待转换
howToUse.description: 工具将渲染并转换电子书的所有页面。

howToUse.title: 下载PDF
howToUse.description: 点击下载保存转换后的PDF文档。

useCases.title: 打印电子书
useCases.description: 将电子书转换为PDF以便物理打印。

useCases.title: 存档书籍
useCases.description: 以长期稳定的PDF格式存储电子书。

useCases.title: 分享文档
useCases.description: 与任何人分享电子书，即使没有电子阅读器。

faq.question: 格式会保留吗？
faq.answer: 是的！此工具使用原生EPUB渲染，以高保真度保留文本格式、图片和布局。

faq.question: 支持受DRM保护的EPUB吗？
faq.answer: 不支持，受DRM保护的电子书无法转换。仅支持无DRM的EPUB文件。

faq.question: 页面大小是如何确定的？
faq.answer: EPUB内容被渲染为标准A4页面大小，以获得最佳可读性。

en.title: MOBI to PDF
en.metaDescription: Convert MOBI e-books to PDF. Support for Kindle format with high-quality rendering.
en.description:
MOBI to PDF converts Amazon Kindle e-book files into high-quality PDF documents. MOBI format (including AZW and AZW3) is Amazon's proprietary e-book format used on Kindle devices.

This tool preserves text formatting, images, and the structure of your Kindle books. Perfect for printing, archiving, or reading on devices that don't support MOBI format.

All conversion happens locally in your browser using advanced rendering technology, ensuring your books remain private.

howToUse.title: Upload MOBI File
howToUse.description: Drag and drop your .mobi, .azw, or .azw3 file or click to select from your device.

howToUse.title: Wait for Conversion
howToUse.description: The tool will render and convert all pages of your e-book.

howToUse.title: Download PDF
howToUse.description: Click Download to save your converted PDF document.

useCases.title: Print Kindle Books
useCases.description: Convert Kindle e-books to PDF for physical printing.

useCases.title: Archive Books
useCases.description: Store Kindle books in universal PDF format.

useCases.title: Cross-Device Reading
useCases.description: Read Kindle books on devices that only support PDF.

faq.question: What MOBI formats are supported?
faq.answer: This tool supports .mobi, .azw, and .azw3 files (non-DRM versions).

faq.question: Are DRM-protected Kindle books supported?
faq.answer: No, DRM-protected e-books cannot be converted. Only DRM-free files are supported.

faq.question: Will my formatting be preserved?
faq.answer: Yes! The tool uses native MOBI rendering to preserve text, images, and layout.

zh.title: MOBI转PDF
zh.metaDescription: 将MOBI电子书转换为PDF。支持Kindle格式的高质量渲染。
zh.description:
MOBI转PDF将亚马逊Kindle电子书文件转换为高质量的PDF文档。MOBI格式（包括AZW和AZW3）是亚马逊专有的电子书格式，用于Kindle设备。

此工具可保留Kindle书籍的文本格式、图片和结构。非常适合打印、存档或在不支持MOBI格式的设备上阅读。

所有转换都在您的浏览器本地进行，使用先进的渲染技术，确保您的书籍保持私密。

howToUse.title: 上传MOBI文件
howToUse.description: 拖放您的.mobi、.azw或.azw3文件，或点击从设备中选择。

howToUse.title: 等待转换
howToUse.description: 工具将渲染并转换电子书的所有页面。

howToUse.title: 下载PDF
howToUse.description: 点击下载保存转换后的PDF文档。

useCases.title: 打印Kindle书籍
useCases.description: 将Kindle电子书转换为PDF以便物理打印。

useCases.title: 存档书籍
useCases.description: 以通用PDF格式存储Kindle书籍。

useCases.title: 跨设备阅读
useCases.description: 在只支持PDF的设备上阅读Kindle书籍。

faq.question: 支持哪些MOBI格式？
faq.answer: 此工具支持.mobi、.azw和.azw3文件（非DRM版本）。

faq.question: 支持受DRM保护的Kindle书籍吗？
faq.answer: 不支持，受DRM保护的电子书无法转换。仅支持无DRM的文件。

faq.question: 格式会保留吗？
faq.answer: 是的！该工具使用原生MOBI渲染来保留文本、图片和布局。

en.title: PDF to SVG
en.metaDescription: Convert PDF pages to SVG vector graphics. Perfect scalability at any size with individual page export.
en.description:
PDF to SVG converts each page of your PDF document into a scalable vector graphic (SVG). SVG is a vector format that maintains perfect quality at any zoom level or print size.

Unlike raster formats (JPG, PNG), SVG graphics never become pixelated when scaled. This makes them ideal for logos, diagrams, technical drawings, and any content that needs to be displayed at different sizes.

Preview each converted page and download them individually or as a ZIP file. All processing happens locally in your browser, ensuring complete privacy for your documents.

howToUse.title: Upload Your PDF
howToUse.description: Drag and drop your PDF file or click to browse and select.

howToUse.title: Configure Options
howToUse.description: Set the resolution quality and optionally specify page ranges.

howToUse.title: Preview and Convert
howToUse.description: Click Convert to process. Preview each page by clicking on thumbnails.

howToUse.title: Download
howToUse.description: Download individual SVG files or all pages as a ZIP archive.

useCases.title: Logos and Graphics
useCases.description: Extract logos and vector graphics from PDFs for use in design software.

useCases.title: Technical Diagrams
useCases.description: Convert technical drawings and diagrams to scalable SVG format.

useCases.title: Web Development
useCases.description: Create web-ready SVG files from PDF content for responsive websites.

useCases.title: Print at Any Size
useCases.description: Generate vector graphics that print perfectly at any size.

faq.question: What is SVG format?
faq.answer: SVG (Scalable Vector Graphics) is a vector image format that can be scaled to any size without losing quality. It is widely used for logos, icons, and web graphics.

faq.question: Will the SVG be truly vector?
faq.answer: The SVG contains a high-resolution rendering of the PDF page. For PDFs with vector content, you get crisp output at any scale.

faq.question: Can I preview before downloading?
faq.answer: Yes! Click on any thumbnail to see a full-size preview of the SVG. You can download individual pages or all at once.

faq.question: What resolution should I choose?
faq.answer: Higher resolution (216 or 288 DPI) produces larger, more detailed SVGs. Use lower settings for faster processing and smaller files.

zh.title: PDF转SVG
zh.metaDescription: 将PDF页面转换为SVG矢量图形。任意尺寸完美缩放，支持单独导出每页。
zh.description:
PDF转SVG将您的PDF文档的每一页转换为可缩放矢量图形（SVG）。SVG是一种矢量格式，在任何缩放级别或打印尺寸下都能保持完美质量。

与光栅格式（JPG、PNG）不同，SVG图形在缩放时永远不会变得模糊。这使其非常适合标志、图表、技术图纸以及任何需要以不同尺寸显示的内容。

预览每个转换后的页面，可以单独下载或作为ZIP文件下载。所有处理都在您的浏览器本地进行，确保您的文档完全隐私。

howToUse.title: 上传PDF文件
howToUse.description: 拖放您的PDF文件或点击浏览选择。

howToUse.title: 配置选项
howToUse.description: 设置分辨率质量，可选择指定页面范围。

howToUse.title: 预览和转换
howToUse.description: 点击转换进行处理。点击缩略图预览每个页面。

howToUse.title: 下载
howToUse.description: 下载单个SVG文件或将所有页面打包为ZIP压缩包。

useCases.title: 标志和图形
useCases.description: 从PDF中提取标志和矢量图形，用于设计软件。

useCases.title: 技术图纸
useCases.description: 将技术图纸和图表转换为可缩放的SVG格式。

useCases.title: 网页开发
useCases.description: 从PDF内容创建网页友好的SVG文件，用于响应式网站。

useCases.title: 任意尺寸打印
useCases.description: 生成可以任意尺寸完美打印的矢量图形。

faq.question: 什么是SVG格式？
faq.answer: SVG（可缩放矢量图形）是一种可以缩放到任意尺寸而不损失质量的矢量图像格式。它广泛用于标志、图标和网页图形。

faq.question: SVG是真正的矢量吗？
faq.answer: SVG包含PDF页面的高分辨率渲染。对于具有矢量内容的PDF，您可以在任何缩放级别获得清晰的输出。

faq.question: 可以在下载前预览吗？
faq.answer: 可以！点击任何缩略图查看SVG的完整尺寸预览。您可以下载单个页面或全部下载。

faq.question: 应该选择什么分辨率？
faq.answer: 更高的分辨率（216或288 DPI）会产生更大、更详细的SVG。使用较低设置可以加快处理速度并获得更小的文件。

en.title: Extract Images from PDF
en.metaDescription: Extract all embedded images from PDF files. Download individually or as a ZIP archive. Filter small images automatically.
en.description:
Extract Images from PDF retrieves all embedded images from your PDF documents. Download high-quality images individually or as a convenient ZIP archive.

The tool automatically filters out small images like icons and decorations based on customizable size thresholds. Process multiple PDFs at once for efficient batch extraction.

All extraction happens in your browser, ensuring your documents remain private and secure.

howToUse.title: Upload Your PDFs
howToUse.description: Drag and drop one or more PDF files or click to select from your device.

howToUse.title: Set Filter Options
howToUse.description: Adjust minimum width, height, and file size to filter out unwanted small images.

howToUse.title: Extract Images
howToUse.description: Click Extract to find all embedded images in your PDFs.

howToUse.title: Download
howToUse.description: Download individual images or all images as a ZIP archive.

useCases.title: Photo Recovery
useCases.description: Extract photos and images embedded in PDF documents for reuse or archiving.

useCases.title: Asset Collection
useCases.description: Gather all graphics and images from PDF reports, presentations, or brochures.

useCases.title: Content Repurposing
useCases.description: Extract images from PDFs to use in other documents, websites, or presentations.

faq.question: What image formats are extracted?
faq.answer: Images are extracted in their native format (JPEG, PNG, etc.) when possible, or converted to PNG for raw image data.

faq.question: Why are some images missing?
faq.answer: Small images below the size threshold are filtered out. Adjust the filter settings to extract smaller images.

faq.question: Can I extract from scanned PDFs?
faq.answer: Scanned PDFs typically contain the scan as one large image per page. Use PDF to Image tool instead for page-by-page conversion.

zh.title: 从PDF提取图片
zh.metaDescription: 从PDF文件中提取所有嵌入的图片。支持单独下载或打包成ZIP下载。自动过滤小尺寸图片。
zh.description:
从PDF提取图片工具可以从您的PDF文档中检索所有嵌入的图片。您可以单独下载高质量图片，也可以将所有图片打包成ZIP压缩包一次性下载。

该工具会根据可自定义的尺寸阈值自动过滤掉小图片（如图标和装饰图案）。支持批量处理多个PDF文件，高效便捷。

所有提取过程都在您的浏览器中进行，确保您的文档保持私密和安全。

howToUse.title: 上传PDF文件
howToUse.description: 拖放一个或多个PDF文件，或点击从设备中选择文件。

howToUse.title: 设置过滤选项
howToUse.description: 调整最小宽度、高度和文件大小，过滤掉不需要的小图片。

howToUse.title: 提取图片
howToUse.description: 点击提取按钮，查找PDF中所有嵌入的图片。

howToUse.title: 下载
howToUse.description: 单独下载每张图片，或将所有图片打包成ZIP压缩包下载。

useCases.title: 图片恢复
useCases.description: 从PDF文档中提取照片和图片，用于重复使用或存档。

useCases.title: 素材收集
useCases.description: 收集PDF报告、演示文稿或宣传册中的所有图形和图片。

useCases.title: 内容再利用
useCases.description: 从PDF中提取图片，用于其他文档、网站或演示文稿。

faq.question: 提取的图片是什么格式？
faq.answer: 图片会尽可能保持原始格式（JPEG、PNG等）提取，原始像素数据会转换为PNG格式。

faq.question: 为什么有些图片没有提取出来？
faq.answer: 小于设定尺寸阈值的图片会被过滤掉。调整过滤设置可以提取更小的图片。

faq.question: 可以从扫描的PDF中提取图片吗？
faq.answer: 扫描的PDF通常每页包含一张大图片。如需逐页转换，请使用"PDF转图片"工具。

en.title: Edit Attachments
en.metaDescription: Manage PDF attachments. View, rename, and remove embedded files.
en.description:
Edit Attachments lets you manage embedded files in PDF documents. View all attachments, rename them, or remove unwanted files from the PDF.

Perfect for cleaning up PDF packages or updating attachment information before distribution.

All editing happens in your browser, ensuring your documents remain private.

howToUse.title: Upload Your PDF
howToUse.description: Drag and drop your PDF file or click to select.

howToUse.title: Manage Attachments
howToUse.description: View, rename, or delete embedded files.

howToUse.title: Save and Download
howToUse.description: Click Save to apply changes and download.

useCases.title: Clean Up PDFs
useCases.description: Remove unnecessary attachments from PDF packages.

useCases.title: Rename Files
useCases.description: Update attachment names for clarity.

useCases.title: Review Contents
useCases.description: Audit embedded files before distribution.

faq.question: Can I add new attachments here?
faq.answer: Use the Add Attachments tool to embed new files.

faq.question: Is removal permanent?
faq.answer: Yes, removed attachments cannot be recovered from the output file.

faq.question: Can I preview attachments?
faq.answer: You can see file names and sizes; use Extract Attachments to view contents.

zh.title: 编辑附件
zh.metaDescription: 管理PDF附件。查看、重命名和删除嵌入的文件。
zh.description:
编辑附件让您管理PDF文档中的嵌入文件。查看所有附件、重命名它们或从PDF中删除不需要的文件。

非常适合在分发前清理PDF包或更新附件信息。

所有编辑都在您的浏览器中进行，确保您的文档保持私密。

howToUse.title: 上传PDF文件
howToUse.description: 拖放您的PDF文件或点击选择。

howToUse.title: 管理附件
howToUse.description: 查看、重命名或删除嵌入的文件。

howToUse.title: 保存并下载
howToUse.description: 点击保存应用更改并下载。

useCases.title: 清理PDF
useCases.description: 从PDF包中删除不必要的附件。

useCases.title: 重命名文件
useCases.description: 更新附件名称以提高清晰度。

useCases.title: 审阅内容
useCases.description: 在分发前审核嵌入的文件。

faq.question: 可以在这里添加新附件吗？
faq.answer: 使用添加附件工具嵌入新文件。

faq.question: 删除是永久的吗？
faq.answer: 是的，删除的附件无法从输出文件中恢复。

faq.question: 可以预览附件吗？
faq.answer: 您可以看到文件名和大小；使用提取附件查看内容。

en.title: Add Blank Page
en.metaDescription: Insert blank pages into PDF documents. Add empty pages at any position.
en.description:
Add Blank Page inserts empty pages into your PDF documents at any position. Add pages before, after, or between existing pages with customizable page size.

Perfect for adding space for notes, creating section dividers, or preparing documents for printing.

All processing happens in your browser, ensuring your documents remain private.

howToUse.title: Upload Your PDF
howToUse.description: Drag and drop your PDF file or click to select.

howToUse.title: Choose Position
howToUse.description: Select where to insert blank pages and how many.

howToUse.title: Add and Download
howToUse.description: Click Add to insert pages and download.

useCases.title: Note Space
useCases.description: Add blank pages for handwritten notes.

useCases.title: Section Dividers
useCases.description: Insert blank pages between document sections.

useCases.title: Print Preparation
useCases.description: Add pages for duplex printing alignment.

faq.question: Can I choose the page size?
faq.answer: Yes, blank pages can match existing pages or use custom dimensions.

faq.question: Can I add multiple blank pages?
faq.answer: Yes, you can add any number of blank pages at once.

faq.question: Can I add colored pages?
faq.answer: Use Background Color tool after adding blank pages to add color.

zh.title: 添加空白页
zh.metaDescription: 在PDF文档中插入空白页。在任何位置添加空页。
zh.description:
添加空白页在PDF文档的任何位置插入空页。在现有页面之前、之后或之间添加页面，可自定义页面大小。

非常适合添加笔记空间、创建章节分隔符或为打印准备文档。

所有处理都在您的浏览器本地进行，确保您的文档保持私密。

howToUse.title: 上传PDF文件
howToUse.description: 拖放您的PDF文件或点击选择。

howToUse.title: 选择位置
howToUse.description: 选择在哪里插入空白页以及插入多少页。

howToUse.title: 添加并下载
howToUse.description: 点击添加插入页面并下载。

useCases.title: 笔记空间
useCases.description: 添加空白页以供手写笔记。

useCases.title: 章节分隔符
useCases.description: 在文档章节之间插入空白页。

useCases.title: 打印准备
useCases.description: 添加页面以对齐双面打印。

faq.question: 可以选择页面大小吗？
faq.answer: 是的，空白页可以匹配现有页面或使用自定义尺寸。

faq.question: 可以添加多个空白页吗？
faq.answer: 是的，您可以一次添加任意数量的空白页。

faq.question: 可以添加彩色页面吗？
faq.answer: 添加空白页后使用背景颜色工具添加颜色。

en.title: Rotate PDF
en.metaDescription: Rotate PDF pages. Turn pages 90, 180, or 270 degrees.
en.description:
Rotate PDF turns pages in your document by 90, 180, or 270 degrees. Fix incorrectly oriented scans, rotate landscape pages, or adjust page orientation for viewing.

Rotate all pages uniformly or select specific pages to rotate individually. The tool preserves all content and formatting.

All processing happens in your browser, ensuring your documents remain private.

howToUse.title: Upload Your PDF
howToUse.description: Drag and drop your PDF file or click to select.

howToUse.title: Select Rotation
howToUse.description: Choose rotation angle and which pages to rotate.

howToUse.title: Rotate and Download
howToUse.description: Click Rotate to apply changes and download.

useCases.title: Fix Scans
useCases.description: Correct orientation of scanned documents.

useCases.title: Landscape Pages
useCases.description: Rotate landscape pages for proper viewing.

useCases.title: Mixed Orientation
useCases.description: Standardize page orientation in mixed documents.

faq.question: Can I rotate different pages differently?
faq.answer: Yes, you can apply different rotations to different pages.

faq.question: Does rotation affect print quality?
faq.answer: No, rotation preserves all content quality.

faq.question: Can I rotate by custom angles?
faq.answer: Rotation is limited to 90-degree increments (90, 180, 270).

zh.title: 旋转PDF
zh.metaDescription: 旋转PDF页面。将页面旋转90、180或270度。
zh.description:
旋转PDF将文档中的页面旋转90、180或270度。修复方向不正确的扫描、旋转横向页面或调整页面方向以供查看。

统一旋转所有页面或选择特定页面单独旋转。该工具保留所有内容和格式。

所有处理都在您的浏览器本地进行，确保您的文档保持私密。

howToUse.title: 上传PDF文件
howToUse.description: 拖放您的PDF文件或点击选择。

howToUse.title: 选择旋转
howToUse.description: 选择旋转角度和要旋转的页面。

howToUse.title: 旋转并下载
howToUse.description: 点击旋转应用更改并下载。

useCases.title: 修复扫描
useCases.description: 纠正扫描文档的方向。

useCases.title: 横向页面
useCases.description: 旋转横向页面以正确查看。

useCases.title: 混合方向
useCases.description: 标准化混合文档中的页面方向。

faq.question: 可以对不同页面进行不同的旋转吗？
faq.answer: 是的，您可以对不同页面应用不同的旋转。

faq.question: 旋转会影响打印质量吗？
faq.answer: 不会，旋转保留所有内容质量。

faq.question: 可以按自定义角度旋转吗？
